# @opensip-tools/checks-typescript

> TypeScript/Node.js fitness checks for opensip-tools

This is a **fitness check pack**. Install it alongside the `opensip-tools` CLI and its checks are discovered automatically.

Part of [**opensip-tools**](https://github.com/opensip-ai/opensip-tools) — an open-source codebase-analysis toolkit: fitness checks (`fit`), static call-graph analysis (`graph`), and simulation (`sim`).

## Install

Most users install the CLI, which bundles the first-party tools:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://opensip.ai/cli/install.sh | bash
```

This package is published for the CLI and advanced plugin authors; most users should not install `@opensip-tools/checks-typescript` directly.
